title: Set of 3 Apothecary Jar Glass Decorative Candy Jars Elegant Storage Candy Buffet Display, Wedding Candy Organizer Canisters (H: 9", 12.5", 14"; 20 FL.OZ, 23 FL.OZ and 28 FL.OZ)
description:
About this item
DIFFERENT SIZES: This set of 3 apothecary jar glass includes 3 beautiful candy glass jars with lids in varying shapes and sizes. The size of the candy jars for candy buffet are approximately (with lids) 9" (H) x 4" (D), 12.5" (H) x 4.5" (D), 14" (H) x 4 "(D). Their capacities are 20 ounces, 23 ounces and 28 ounces, respectively.
PERFECT QUALITY: The glass apothecary jars set are made of high quality hand-blown sturdy and durable glass. They are crystal clear, which helps you quickly judge the state of the items stored in the apothecary jars. You can also add other delicate crafts to the glass jar to make it your own unique creative jar.
MODERN ELEGANCE: These glass apothecary jars with lid are perfect for a variety of settings, from bathroom and kitchen storage, to home and venue decoration, garden floral and glass container displays and more. The uses for these decorative glass jars are endless!
IDEAL GIFT OPTION: The candy jars set are the perfect way to add festive holiday cheer to your home, for Wedding, Birthday Parties, Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas, New Year. The elegant shape and lightweight design is guaranteed to impress your guest.
GUARANTEED: If the glass canister set are broken during transportation, please contact us and we will provide you with a replacement at the first time.
